The '''Galactic Alliance Advisory Council''' was the successor of the [[New Republic Advisory Council]]. Initially, [[Chief of State (Galactic Alliance)|Chief of State]] [[Cal Omas]] believed that the [[High Council (Galactic Alliance)|High Council]] could efficiently govern the [[Galaxy/Legends|galaxy]] during wartime, and the advisory council did not exist for some time. Sometime before the [[Battle of Yuuzhan'tar]], [[Cal Omas]] and the [[Galactic Alliance Senate]] recreated the Advisory Council.

The advisory council was designed to be an inner circle of elite senators, intending to keep the Chief of State involved in the affairs of the [[Galactic Alliance Senate|Senate]] while conducting the [[Yuuzhan Vong War|war against the Yuuzhan Vong]]. Though Omas relied more upon the advice of the High Council during the war, the Advisory Council proved instrumental in reestablishing order throughout [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. The Advisory Council replaced the High Council after the [[Swarm War]].

==Members==
*[[Chief of State (Galactic Alliance)|Chief of State]] [[Cal Omas]] of [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]]
*[[Minister of State]] [[Releqy A'Kla]] of [[Susevfi]]
*[[Minister of Justice (Galactic Alliance)|Minister of Justice]] [[Ta'laam Ranth]] of [[Antar 4/Legends|Antar 4]]
*[[Galactic Alliance Senate|Senator]] [[Triebakk]] of [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]]
*Senator [[Niuk Niuv]] of [[Sullust/Legends|Sullust]]
